rubric_items.reasoning: The agent successfully deployed all three required resources (ray-head Deployment, ray-head Service, ray-worker Deployment) and the oracle verdict is pass. The validation command printed 'ok' as required. The agent deployed the worker with 2 replicas as specified. The agent ran `ray start` inside the ray-client pod to work around a Ray 2.9.0 compatibility issue (ray.init requires a local raylet), which is a pragmatic solution that kept the Kubernetes resource definition unchanged while enabling the validation to succeed. All regression sweep stages pass.
